moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Tennis Championships are in their final week, with the men's and women's singles finals approaching at the All England Club.

angles.name: Classic Wimbledon
angles.copy: Centre Court drama intensifies! It's finals week at Wimbledon – who are you backing for the trophy?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon is down to the wire. Can any British hopefuls make a late surge?

moments.title: England vs. Mexico World Cup Knockout
moments.blurb: England faces Mexico in a crucial World Cup knockout match today, with fans eagerly anticipating the result.

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: It's World Cup knockout day! England takes on Mexico – get those shirts on, it's going to be a big one!

angles.name: Pre-Match Thoughts
angles.copy: The tension is building for England vs. Mexico! What's your prediction for tonight's World Cup clash?

moments.title: BTS in London
moments.blurb: K-Pop superstars BTS are playing two nights at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London, starting today, as part of their biggest tour yet.

angles.name: BTS Mania
angles.copy: ARMY assemble! BTS kick off their massive London shows tonight at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. Who's got tickets?!

angles.name: Global Phenomenon
angles.copy: BTS are bringing the K-Pop sensation to London for two nights! Expect incredible energy and huge hits.

moments.title: Karol G at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
moments.blurb: Colombian reggaeton star Karol G performs a one-off UK show tonight at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London.

angles.name: Bichota Season
angles.copy: Karol G is taking over Tottenham Hotspur Stadium tonight for her only UK date! Who's ready for the 'Bichota' vibes?

angles.name: Reggaeton Queen
angles.copy: The queen of reggaeton, Karol G, is live in London tonight! Get ready for a night of her biggest hits.

moments.title: Def Leppard & Extreme UK Tour Finale
moments.blurb: Rock legends Def Leppard, with special guests Extreme, conclude their UK tour tonight in Manchester.

angles.name: Rock Out Manchester
angles.copy: Def Leppard and Extreme bring their UK tour to a thunderous close tonight in Manchester! Who's there to 'Pour Some Sugar On Me'?

angles.name: Legends Live
angles.copy: Two iconic rock bands, one final UK show! Def Leppard and Extreme are ready to ignite Manchester tonight.

moments.title: Happy 51st to 50 Cent
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis James Jackson III) celebrates his 51st birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only 50 Cent! What's your favourite track from the G-Unit general?

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! Wishing a very happy 51st to 50 Cent today. Still got 'In Da Club' on repeat!

moments.title: John Keeble of Spandau Ballet turns 67
moments.blurb: John Keeble, the drummer for iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: True Gold Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 67th Birthday to John Keeble, the powerhouse drummer of Spandau Ballet! What's your favourite track from the band?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Raise a glass to John Keeble of Spandau Ballet, celebrating his 67th today! Still 'True' to the 80s sound.

moments.title: Kate Nash turns 39
moments.blurb: British indie-pop singer-songwriter Kate Nash, known for hits like 'Foundations,' celebrates her 39th birthday today.

angles.name: Foundations of Pop
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to the brilliant Kate Nash! Still love 'Foundations' as much as the first listen.

angles.name: British Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating Kate Nash's 39th birthday today! A true British talent with a unique sound.

moments.title: Official Singles Chart First Look
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is on track to break records for weeks at #1, while Madonna's 'Danceteria' is the highest new entry in the Official Singles Chart First Look.

angles.name: Chart Battle
angles.copy: History in the making on the Official Singles Chart! Can Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold on for a record-breaking #1? Plus, a big new entry from Madonna!

angles.name: Madonna's Return
angles.copy: Madonna is back in a big way with 'Danceteria' as the highest new entry in the Official Singles Chart First Look! What do you think of her new track?

moments.title: Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod
moments.blurb: The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod, a major celebration of music and culture, begins tomorrow in North Wales and runs until July 12.

angles.name: Welsh Culture
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod kicks off in North Wales! A fantastic celebration of global music and culture.

angles.name: International Flavour
angles.copy: Get ready for a week of incredible music from around the world as the Llangollen Eisteddfod begins tomorrow!

moments.title: The 154th Open at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's major tournaments, begins July 12th at Royal Birkdale in Southport, England.

angles.name: Golf Major
angles.copy: Tee off! The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale starts next week. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Links Golf
angles.copy: One of golf's most historic events is almost here! The Open returns to the challenging links of Royal Birkdale on July 12th.

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK - After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: Season 2 of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix on Sunday, July 12, catching up with the cast.

angles.name: Reality TV Catch-up
angles.copy: Did they stay together? 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 drops on Netflix this Sunday! Get ready for the drama.

angles.name: Post-Pod Drama
angles.copy: The pods are a distant memory, but the drama isn't! 'Love is Blind: UK - After the Altar' S2 lands on Netflix this weekend.

moments.title: Courtney Love turns 62
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the iconic Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: Alt-Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a fierce 62nd Birthday to Courtney Love! A true alt-rock legend.

moments.title: Marc Almond of Soft Cell turns 69
moments.blurb: Marc Almond, the distinctive voice of synth-pop duo Soft Cell, celebrates his 69th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Tainted Love Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the legendary Marc Almond of Soft Cell! Still got 'Tainted Love' on repeat?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of synth-pop icon Marc Almond today! His voice defined an era.

moments.title: Jim Kerr of Simple Minds turns 67
moments.blurb: Jim Kerr, the charismatic frontman of Scottish rock band Simple Minds, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Don't You Forget About Him
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Jim Kerr, the incredible voice of Simple Minds! What's your favourite stadium anthem?

angles.name: Scottish Rock Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Scottish rock legend Jim Kerr today! Still delivering powerful performances.

moments.title: Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival
moments.blurb: The Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival kicks off on July 10th, bringing a diverse lineup of international talent to Scotland's capital until July 19th.

angles.name: Jazz in Edinburgh
angles.copy: Get ready to groove! The Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival starts this Friday, bringing some incredible talent to Scotland's capital.

angles.name: Festival City
angles.copy: Edinburgh's festival season continues with the Jazz & Blues Festival starting July 10th! Who are you hoping to see?

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie on Netflix
moments.blurb: The beloved classic 'Little House on the Prairie' arrives on Netflix on July 9th, bringing the Ingalls family's story to new audiences.

angles.name: Nostalgic Comfort
angles.copy: Get ready for some classic comfort TV! 'Little House on the Prairie' arrives on Netflix this Thursday. Who's excited to revisit Walnut Grove?

angles.name: Family Viewing
angles.copy: A timeless story for a new generation! 'Little House on the Prairie' is coming to Netflix on July 9th – perfect for family viewing.

moments.title: Adam Lambert Solo London Show
moments.blurb: Adam Lambert is performing a rare solo show at the Roundhouse in London on July 21st, celebrating his new album 'ADAM'.

angles.name: Glambert Alert
angles.copy: Adam Lambert is bringing his new solo album to London's Roundhouse on July 21st! A rare chance to see him without Queen.

angles.name: Solo Spotlight
angles.copy: Beyond Queen, Adam Lambert shines in his own right. Catch his solo show in London later this month!

moments.title: Glastonbury on Fallow Year
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival is taking a planned fallow year in 2026 to allow Worthy Farm to recover, meaning no festival this year.

angles.name: No Glasto This Year
angles.copy: Just a reminder for those planning their summer: Glastonbury is on a fallow year in 2026. Worthy Farm is taking a well-deserved break!

angles.name: Planning for 2027
angles.copy: Missing Glastonbury this year? The good news is it'll be back in 2027! Time to start planning for the next one.

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Concludes
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup in England concluded yesterday, July 5th, after weeks of thrilling cricket.

angles.name: Women's Cricket Recap
angles.copy: What a tournament! The ICC Women's T20 World Cup wrapped up yesterday in England. Who were your standout players?

angles.name: Tournament Highlights
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the ICC Women's T20 World Cup! Congratulations to the winners and all the teams for an incredible competition.
